title: Cloudflare Global Outage
storyIntro: You are the primary on-call SRE at Cloudflare. At 2:13 AM UTC, alerts begin firing across multiple regions. Customers are reporting failed requests, elevated latency, and complete downtime. Discord, Shopify, and Canva are beginning to fail globally. Your manager pings you: 'We need mitigation NOW. The internet is depending on us.'
brief: A routine regex routing rule update has accidentally triggered 100% CPU saturation on our global edge nodes, dropping 50% of global HTTP web traffic.

agents.name: Marcus
agents.message: We're getting customer escalations every minute.

agents.name: Priya
agents.message: Traffic spikes started after latest config deployment.

sandbox.template:
#!/bin/bash
# Cloudflare Edge Router Configuration Rollback
# Add commands below to stabilize the issue.

# Current Metrics:
# CPU Usage: ${cpu}%
# Latency: ${latency}ms
# Error Rate: ${errorRate}%

# Expected Actions:
# 1. Rollback to previous stable config
# 2. Throttle retries to reduce CPU load
# 3. Restart specific edge routers
# 4. Rebalance traffic away from EU-West
expected_actions: Rollback latest config to previous stable version
Throttle retry mechanism to reduce CPU load
Restart specific edge routers experiencing instability
Shift traffic away from EU-West region

detection.ai_behavior_shift: Marcus is calmly asking for updates, focusing on gathering initial data.

investigation.ai_behavior_shift: Marcus becomes more directive, pushing for quicker analysis.

escalation.ai_behavior_shift: Marcus escalates urgency, demanding immediate action reports every 5 minutes.

mitigation.ai_behavior_shift: Marcus shifts focus to coordinating efforts and ensuring team collaboration.

recovery.ai_behavior_shift: Marcus prioritizes customer communication and post-mortem readiness.

evolving_logs: [CRITICAL] Router CPU usage now at 99% - thermal throttling engaged
[EMERGENCY] BGP route flapping detected across multiple regions
[FAILURE] EU-West routers beginning to drop all inbound traffic
[PANIC] Global CDN cache corruption detected - serving 500 errors

incorrect_action_consequences.cf-router restart --all: Triggers cascading failures as all routers reboot simultaneously
incorrect_action_consequences.cf-cache purge --global: Forces all CDN nodes to refetch origin - worsens latency by 300%

manager.name: Marcus
manager.style: Demands minute-by-minute updates but trusts technical expertise
manager.stress_response: Switches to ALL CAPS in chat during SEV2+

cto.name: Jocelyn
cto.style: Asks high-level architecture questions during outages
cto.stress_response: Joins bridge calls but remains eerily calm

scenario_specific_outputs.cf-router status --region EU-West:
ROUTER_ID STATUS CPU TEMP
edge-01 OFFLINE 102C
edge-02 CRITICAL 98C
edge-03 UNSTABLE 94C
scenario_specific_outputs.cf-traffic stats --global:
REGION LATENCY ERROR_RATE
EU-West 2400ms 89%
US-East 320ms 12%
APAC 1800ms 45%
scenario_specific_outputs.cf-config diff v1.2.3 v1.2.4:
DIFF FOUND:
- BGP timers reduced from 3000ms to 500ms
- Retry limit increased from 3 to 15
- Added aggressive ECMP rebalancing
